name: A TINY MISTAKE | Samantha Takahashi
description:
“You got covid?”

You and your roommate have been doing it without using condoms. Unfortunately for both of you, this led to her getting pregnant.

Now, it's up to you to step up and be a father, or just run away like her exes. Good luck, I guess!

Original Creator: @KARLASHNIKOVA

I improved the bot for my own personal taste, but decided to leave it public. The original creator gave me his permission to post this bot. Hope y'all enjoy it as much as i did!

(All "Stolen" comments will be removed. To prove it wasn't stolen at all, the character definition will be public.)

creator: cocainefrog
